---
title: "William Coulthard Yonge"
---

## William Coulthard Yonge

**Dates:** (September-December 1859)

### Description

nephew of CMY

### Biography

He died as a baby. Coleridge gives his names as William Keble Yonge (Keble was his godfather) but his birth and death were evidently registered as William Coulthard Yonge.  His maternal grandmother was born Mary Emma Coulthard.

### Letters

- Letter from July 9th 1877 
- Letter from November 3, 1859

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
